params.TriggerDescription: When NICKNAME enters, target opponent becomes the monarch.
Whenever an opponent becomes the monarch, gain control of target creature that player controls for as long as they're the monarch.

params.Description: Creatures you control but don't own get +2/+2 and can't be sacrificed.
